label: Quora — Q&A Platform
description: Quora — Q&A knowledge platform. Feed of questions/answers. Login gate for full content. Used for Q&A marketing, topic research, expert positioning.
source_patterns: Feed scroll: question cards with snippets, 1-2 visible at a time, 2-4s between pauses (reading)
Question page: full question + answers list, upvote/downvote per answer, deep vertical scroll for long-form content
Answer composition: click 'Write answer' → editor with formatting toolbar → 800-2000ms think → compose → submit
Comment threads: click comment icon → wait 1-2s for thread expand → type → submit
Search: click search bar → type query (pause 300-800ms) → wait 1-2s for results → scroll results
Login: email or Google/Facebook OAuth — post_login wait 4-6s for feed render

active_hours.description: Knowledge-seeking — business hours, evening. Peaks around work breaks and after dinner.

scroll.description: Feed — moderate passes for question scanning; answer reading — deep scroll with longer pauses for long-form content. Source: general Q&A browsing patterns

long_read_scroll.description: Slower, deliberate scroll for reading full answers

mouse.description: Moderate — deliberate browsing and reading mode

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate feed → scroll 3-5 passes → click interesting question → deep scroll through answers → upvote/downvote → optionally comment or write answer → search for topics → repeat
